verse_text: Blessed are the merciful, For they shall obtain mercy.

pericope.title: The Beatitudes: The Blessings of True Discipleship

links.context: "Who then are the 'merciful' ([[MAT.5:7]])? Those who give money or feed the poor? No. But who are they? Those who have become poor for the sake of Him who became poor for our sakes (see [[2CO.8:9]])" (SymNew). These have nothing material to give, yet they constantly weep with compassion over the man in distress.
